subcodes.first_line: He hath indeed appeared, the Ridván, in this wondrous age, to the right of the Throne of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. Glorified be He Who created it by His command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الرضوان فی بدع الزمان عن یمین عرش ربک الرحمن فسبحان من خلقه بامر من
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @idolatry, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
